fields.validation_status: Source and target tool trees were compared before integration; ../context-stack now builds context-cli, context-mcp, context-http, context-editor-kernel, and sandbox-app via focused cargo check after manifest retargeting and local context-http bootstrap changes. Source-repo ownership cleanup remains separate because the mounted crates/context-stack submodule in context-engine still points at an older commit without tools.
